summary: The diff implements all aspects of REQ-1: barcode width field added to LabelSettingsTab UI, barcodeWidth field added to labelSettingsStore with localStorage persistence and migration, barcodeSettingsValidation updated to validate barcodeWidth (1-10 dots), LabelPreview updated to use barcodeWidth, cpclGenerator updated to use barcodeWidth, and labelSettingsImportExport updated to include barcodeWidth in serialization/deserialization.
